ddls:
CREATE TABLE "treaties" (
  "treaty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax treaty */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country involved in the treaty */,
  "protocol_status" TEXT /* Status of the protocol associated with the treaty (if any) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the treaty (e.g., Income and Capital) */,
  "signature_date" TEXT /* Date the treaty was signed */,
  "entry_into_force_date" TEXT /* Date when the treaty entered into force */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the treaty becomes effective */,
  "treaty_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of treaty */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the treaty */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the treaty was terminated */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the termination of the treaty */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the treaty record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treaty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treaties_treaty_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("treaty_type_id") REFERENCES treaty_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treaties_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES treaty_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treaties_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "treaty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated treaty */,
  "protocol_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the protocol */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the protocol record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocols_treaty_id FOREIGN KEY ("treaty_id") REFERENCES treaties ("treaty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tax advisor, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "treaty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treaty being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment has been deleted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_treaty_id FOREIGN KEY ("treaty_id") REFERENCES treaties ("treaty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "treaty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treaty being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the treaty */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the treaty was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the treaty */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the treaty */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_treaty_id FOREIGN KEY ("treaty_id") REFERENCES treaties ("treaty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "treaty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated treaty */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amendment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the amendment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the amendment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_treaty_id FOREIGN KEY ("treaty_id") REFERENCES treaties ("treaty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treaty_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treaty type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the treaty type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treaty type */,
  "is_multilateral" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the treaty type is multilateral */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the treaty type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treaty_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the status is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the treaty status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treaty_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "base_treaty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base treaty */,
  "related_treaty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related treaty */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treaty_relationships_base_treaty_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_treaty_id") REFERENCES treaties ("treaty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treaty_relationships_related_treaty_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_treaty_id") REFERENCES treaties ("treaty_id")
)
